description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux Ubuntu x64/arm64 that triggers on push events. Use a matrix strategy to build on both ubuntu-latest and ubuntu-24.04-arm environments with Qt versions 5 and 6. For each job, check out the code, update package information, install Qt, OpenCascade, and Assimp dependencies, build the project with CMake, and execute unit tests in a simulated X11 display environment.
